caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is dressed in a white shirt with gold suspenders and a red bow tie, and he wears a distinctive gray wig styled upwards. The setting appears to be a studio or a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him, suggesting a personal or professional space with a focus on memories or achievements. A mannequin wearing a black outfit and cap is visible in the background, adding to the eclectic decor. The man is engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone while wearing headphones, indicating an interactive session, possibly involving an audience or co-hosts.
